question: What text is displayed on the chef's apron during the cooking segments? A. MAD GENIUS B. FOOD & WINE C. JUSTIN CHAPPLE D. MAD TIPS

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with short blonde hair wears a blue patterned shirt and a grey apron with green text. He stands behind a wooden counter gesturing with his hands. A silver metal baking sheet rests on top of a thick wooden cutting board in front of him. A white bowl containing red tomatoes sits on the counter to the right of the cutting board. A stainless steel refrigerator is visible to the left.

question: How many white text overlays are visible?

What action is the man wearing a black apron performing?
Describe the sequence of introductory graphics and host actions visible before the main tutorial begins.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a white ampersand symbol centers on a black background; at 2s, a man in a black shirt pours dark liquid from a cup; at 4s, the man holds a glass bottle horizontally in front of his face; at 8s, orange confetti falls over Mad Tips text; at 12s, the host stands behind a counter with a bowl of tomatoes.
